title: Zaps Converter
description: Converts conventional Forge Energy into Zaps from FTBIC
body:
This mod adds one block, the Zaps Converter

 

The converter takes in Forge Energy from the input side, and outputs Zaps to adjacent FTBIC machines, transformers and battery boxes.

 

This block's energy output is dependent on the voltage level of the accepting block, it does not overload the accepting machine.

 

Conversion rate is configurable, default is 4FE per Zap


[![Sponsor Time](https://jonn.dk/akliz_banner_productivebees.png)](https://www.akliz.net/lobstermods)
